The registry changes observation shows that the malware did not attempt to persist or modify any registry keys. This suggests that the malware may not be using traditional persistence mechanisms. I wo

The file system activity observation shows that the malware did not write any files to disk. This suggests that the malware may be operating entirely in memory or using alternative storage mechanisms.
